Idea Name: AI-Based Smart Energy Demand Forecasting and Grid Optimization System
Expected benefits:
Reduced power outages.
Efficient energy utilization.
Lower operational costs.
Idea Description: This system predicts energy demand using consumption patterns, weather data, industrial activity, and seasonal trends. It helps government energy agencies optimize power generation, reduce outages, and support renewable energy integration.
potentail Challenges:
High-frequency time-series data handling.
Integration with legacy grid systems.
Forecasting renewable variability.
